subject: [PATCH + QUESTION] bpf: use cond_resched_tasks_rcu_qs in bpf_fd_array_map_clear() loop

reviews.author: Rik van Riel
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's approach, suggesting it may not be the right solution to the problem.

reviews.author: Paul E. McKenney
reviews.summary: Proposed an alternative solution, suggesting the use of cond_resched_tasks_rcu_qs() as a way to avoid holding mutexes across synchronize_rcu_tasks().

2026-07-17.patch_summary: The patch aims to use cond_resched_tasks_rcu_qs in bpf_fd_array_map_clear() loop, but the approach is questioned by Rik van Riel and Paul E. McKenney.
